select.isEqual: SELECT TBRECORD.RecordID , TBRECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE , TBRECORD.ProcessDeptName RECDEPTNAME , TBRECORD.RegisterDate , TBRECORD.RegisterYear , TBRECORD.RegisterNo , TBRECORD.AprMemberTitle , TBRECORD.DrafterName , TBRECORD.ExecuteDate , TBRECORD.ReceiptMemberName , TBRECORD.DeliveryNo , TBRECORD.ProduceDeptRegNo , TBRECORD.ElectronicRecFlag , TBRECORD.OldRecordFlag , TBRECORD.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBRECORD.AttachFlag , TBRECORD.RejectFlag , TBRECORD.CreateDate RECCREATEDATE , TBRECORD.ManualRegFlag , TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo , TBSEPATT.RegisterType , TBSEPATT.Title RECTITLE , TBSEPATT.NumOfPage , TBSEPATT.ModifyFlag , TBSEPATT.CreateDate , TBAV.Summary , TBAV.RecordType , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , TBOLD.RecordNo , TBOLD.KeepingPeriod RECKP , SUBSTR(TBRECORD.RegisterNo, 8, 6) RECREGSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAUDIO_VISUALRECEXTRAINFO TBAV ON TBSEPATT.RecordID = TBAV.RecordID AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = TBAV.SeperateAttachNo AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBAV.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBOLDRECORDEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBOLD.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBRECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT TBRECORD.RecordID , TBRECORD.ProcessDeptCode RECDEPTCODE , NVL(TBRECORD.ProcessDeptName2, TBRECORD.ProcessDeptName) RECDEPTNAME , TBRECORD.RegisterDate , TBRECORD.RegisterYear , TBRECORD.RegisterNo , NVL(TBRECORD.AprMemberTitle2, TBRECORD.AprMemberTitle) APRMEMBERTITLE , NVL(TBRECORD.DrafterName2, TBRECORD.DrafterName) DRAFTERNAME , TBRECORD.ExecuteDate , NVL(TBRECORD.ReceiptMemberName2, TBRECORD.ReceiptMemberName) RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , TBRECORD.DeliveryNo , TBRECORD.ProduceDeptRegNo , TBRECORD.ElectronicRecFlag , TBRECORD.OldRecordFlag , TBRECORD.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBRECORD.AttachFlag , TBRECORD.RejectFlag , TBRECORD.CreateDate RECCREATEDATE , TBRECORD.ManualRegFlag , TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo , TBSEPATT.RegisterType , TBSEPATT.Title RECTITLE , TBSEPATT.NumOfPage , TBSEPATT.ModifyFlag , TBSEPATT.CreateDate , TBAV.Summary , TBAV.RecordType , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , NVL(TBOLD.CreateOrganName2, TBOLD.CreateOrganName) CREATEORGANNAME , TBOLD.RecordNo , TBOLD.KeepingPeriod RECKP , SUBSTR(TBRECORD.RegisterNo, 8, 6) RECREGSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAUDIO_VISUALRECEXTRAINFO TBAV ON TBSEPATT.RecordID = TBAV.RecordID AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = TBAV.SeperateAttachNo AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBAV.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBOLDRECORDEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBOLD.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBRECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprType , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprState , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberID , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberIsDeptYN , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberName , NVL(TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberName2, TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberName) APRMEMBERNAME2 , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberJobTitle2, TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptID , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName , NVL(TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName2, TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberDeptName) APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberLDAPPath , TBAPRLINEINFO.ReceivedDate , TBAPRLINEINFO.ProcessDate , TBAPRLINEINFO.isProposerYN , TBAPRLINEINFO.isBriefUserYN , TBAPRLINEINFO.ReasonDoNotApprov , TBEXPAPRLINE.orguserid , TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserid , TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyusername , NVL(TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyusername2, TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyusername) PROXYUSERNAME2 , TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle , NVL(TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle2, TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserjobtitle) PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2 , TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptid , TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname , NVL(TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname2, TBEXPAPRLINE.proxyuserdeptname) PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRLINE ON TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID = TBEXPAPRLINE.docid AND TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = TBEXPAPRLINE.aprmemberSN AND TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN DESC
SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLASTAPRLINE WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBAPRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBAPRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBAPRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBAPRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBAPRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBEXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2 , TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRLINE ON TBAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBEXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBEXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBAPRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROVAL AS REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBEXPENDAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBENDAPRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT TBAPRLINEINFO.DOCID, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, TBAPRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE, TBAPRLINEINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBAPRLINEINFO.ISPROPOSERYN, TBAPRLINEINFO.ISBRIEFUSERYN, TBAPRLINEINFO.REASONDONOTAPPROV, TBEXPAPRLINE.ORGUSERID, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERID, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME2, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTID, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, TBEXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRLINE ON TBAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBEXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBEXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRLINEINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY TBAPRLINEINFO.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT A.OWNERID || '@' || CAST(A.SN AS VARCHAR(20)) AS DOCID, A.APRMEMBERSN, A.APRTYPE, A.APRSTATE, A.APRMEMBERID, A.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, A.APRMEMBERNAME, A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, A.APRMEMBERDEPTID, A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, A.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, A.RECEIVEDDATE, A.PROCESSDATE, A.ISPROPOSERYN, A.ISBRIEFUSERYN, A.REASONDONOTAPPROV, A.AprMemberName2, A.AprMemberJobTitle2, A.AprMemberDeptName2, B.ORGUSERID, B.PROXYUSERID, B.PROXYUSERNAME, B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, B.PROXYUSERDEPTID, B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPEXPAPRLINE B ON A.OWNERID = B.OWNERID AND A.SN = B.SN AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID ) A WHERE A.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY A.$v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , A.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, A.APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT TBFORMINFO.* FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFORMINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFORMUSERINFO ON TBFORMINFO.FORMID = TBFORMUSERINFO.FORMID AND TBFORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBFORMUSERINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBFORMUSERINFO.USERID = #v_USERID#
AND FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
AND FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND FORMNAME LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMNAME2 LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND TBFORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFORMINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFORMCONTUSERGROUP ON TBFORMINFO.FORMCONTID = TBFORMCONTUSERGROUP.FORMCONTID AND TBFORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBFORMCONTUSERGROUP.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFORMCONTAINER ON TBFORMINFO.FORMCONTID = TBFORMCONTAINER.FORMCONTID AND TBFORMINFO.TENANT_ID = TBFORMCONTAINER.TENANT_ID WHERE (1=1) AND TBFORMINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
AND FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND FORMNAME LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMNAME2 LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND ( FORMCONTOWNDEPID = 'ALL' OR FORMCONTUSERDEPID = ( SELECT DEPARTMENT FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN=#v_USERID#))
SELECT TBFORMINFO.* FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFORMINFO
WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID#
WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND FORMDOCTYPE < '004'
WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND FORMDOCTYPE = #v_FORMKIND#
AND FORMNAME LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMNAME2 LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND FORMDESCRIPTION LIKE '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY FORMORDER

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT SUBCATEGORYCODE , NVL(SCNAME, SCNAME2) SCNAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VTASKCLASS WHERE ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND MCATEGORYCODE = #v_CATECODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SCNAME ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE , TASKNAME , NVL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME2 , KEEPINGPERIOD , DISPLAYRECFLAG , DISPLAYRECTRASTIME , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 , TEMPFLAG , KEEPINGMETHOD , KEEPINGPLACE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VTASKCLASS WHERE SUBCATEGORYCODE = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND ( TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TASKNAME ASC

SELECT TBCABINET.CABINETID, TBCABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBCABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBCABINET.VOLUMENO, TBCABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBCABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBCABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBCABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBCABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBCABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBCABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBCABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBCABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBCABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBCABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBCABINETCLASS.TITLE2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBCABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBCABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0')
AND TRIM(TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #v_PDEPTCODE#
AND TBCABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR = #v_PYEAR#
AND TBCABINETCLASS.EXPIRATIONYEAR >= #v_PACCOUNTPYEAR#
AND TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK = #v_TASKCODE#
AND TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBCABINET.CABINETID IN (SELECT CABINETID FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) AS VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID ) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBCABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBCABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID )
AND TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBCABINET.CREATEDATE DESC, TBCABINET.CABINETID DESC

SELECT DISTINCT TASKCODE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, KEEPINGPERIOD, DISPLAYRECFLAG, DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, TEMPFLAG, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, PROCESSDEPTCODE, PROCESSDEPTNAME, NVL(PROCESSDEPTNAME2,PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, CATEGORYCODE, CNAME, CNAME2, MCATEGORYCODE, MCNAME, MCNAME2, SUBCATEGORYCODE, SCNAME, SCNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VTASKCLASS $v_subQuery$ ORDER BY TASKCODE

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT SN, NAME, WIDTH, TABLENAME, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT SN, NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME, WIDTH, TABLENAME, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE, COLNAME || ' AS ' || COLALIAS AS SELECTFIELD FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME, COLALIAS, DTYPE, COLNAME || ' AS ' || COLALIAS AS SELECTFIELD FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLISTINFO WHERE LISTTYPE = #v_LISTTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SN ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT TBRECORD.SpecialRecordCode , TBRECORD.PublicityCode , TBRECORD.LimitRange , TBSEPATT.CatalogTransferFlag , TBSEPATT.CatalogTransferYear , TBSEPATT.DocTransferFlag , TBSEPATT.DocTransferYear , TBCAB.CabinetID , TBCAB.VolumeNo , TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptCode CABDEPTCODE , TBCABCLS.Title CABTITLE , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName CABDEPTNAME , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName2 CABDEPTNAME2 , TBCABCLS.TaskCode , TBCABCLS.TaskName , TBCABCLS.TaskName2 , TBCABCLS.ProductionYear , TBCABCLS.RegSerialNo , TBCABCLS.ConfirmFlag FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH TBSEPATT ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPATT.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET TBCAB ON TBSEPATT.CabinetID = TBCAB.CabinetID AND TBSEPATT.TENANT_ID = TBCAB.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS TBCABCLS ON TBCAB.CabinetClassNo = TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo AND TBCAB.TENANT_ID = TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID WHERE TBRECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPATT.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM ( $sqlString$
SELECT CODETYPE , CODE , NAME , NAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT $v_COLS$ FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT $v_COLS$ FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT TBCABINET.CabinetID , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo , TBCABINETCLASS.OwnerID , TBCABINETCLASS.Title , TBCABINETCLASS.Title2 , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD , VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG , VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG , VTASKCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , VTASKCLASS.SC1 , VTASKCLASS.SC2 , VTASKCLASS.SC3 , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD , VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE , VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME , VTASKCLASS.TASKNAME2 , VTASKCLASS.SCName , VTASKCLASS.SubCategoryCode , TBCABINETCLASS.RecTypeCode , TBCABINETCLASS.RegSerialNo , TBCABINET.VolumeNo FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBMYTASKCODE ON TBMYTASKCODE.CabinetID = TBCABINET.CabinetID AND TBMYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VTASKCLASS ON VTASKCLASS.TaskCode = TBMYTASKCODE.TaskCode AND VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBMYTASKCODE.TENANT_ID
WHERE TBCABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBCABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBCABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND TBMYTASKCODE.CN = #v_USERID# AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBCABINETCLASS.Title

SELECT TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo , VOLUMENO , TITLE , NVL(TITLE2, TITLE) TITLE2 , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , REGSERIALNO , PRODUCTIONYEAR , RECTYPECODE , TBCABINETCLASS.DisplayRecFlag , TBCABINETCLASS.DisplayEndDate , TBCABINETCLASS.SpecialCatalogFlag , SCINFO.SC1 , SCINFO.SC2 , SCINFO.SC3 , CATEGORYCODE , MCATEGORYCODE , SUBCATEGORYCODE , CABINETTRANSFERFLAG , TCABINETID , TDEPTCODE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 , TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE SERIALNO = '000' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) SCINFO ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = SCINFO.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = SCINFO.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VTASKCLASS ON TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode = VTASKCLASS.TASKCODE AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID WHERE TRIM(TBCABINET.CabinetID) = #v_CABINETID# AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DOCID, CHANGESN, URL, CHANGEUSERID, CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE, CHANGEUSERJOBTITLE2, CHANGEUSERNAME, CHANGEUSERNAME2, CHANGEUSERDEPTID, CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME, CHANGEUSERDEPTNAME2, CHANGEDATE, CHKFLAG FROM TBHISTORYDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, CHANGEDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, CHANGEDATE DESC
ORDER BY CHANGEDATE DESC

SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBHISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFYUSERNAME2, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE, MODIFYUSERJOBTITLE2, MODIFYUSERDEPTID, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME, MODIFYUSERDEPTNAME2, CHKFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBHISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MODIFYSN = #v_MODIFYSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, APRMEMBERSN DESC
ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT DOCID, ATTACHFILESN, ATTACHFILENAME, ATTACHFILEDISPLAYNAME, ATTACHFILEHREF, ATTACHFILESIZE, ATTACHUSERID, ATTACHUSERNAME, ATTACHUSERNAME2, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE, ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE2, ATTACHUSERDEPTID, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME, ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYSN, MODIFYFLAG, PAGENUM, CHKFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBHISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC'
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, MODIFYDATE DESC
ORDER BY MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE , PROCESSDATE , RECEIVEDDATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DOCID , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERNAME , APRMEMBERNAME2 , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME , APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN , APRMEMBERLDAPPATH FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERSN > #v_APRMEMBERSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '001','004','016','018','019' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '008','009','011','012' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocType , A.DocState , A.OrgDocID , B.AprMemberID , B.AprMemberName , B.AprMemberName2 , B.AprMemberDeptID , B.AprMemberDeptName , B.AprMemberDeptName2 , C.companyID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND B.AprMemberSN = '1' AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , EXTRECEPTEMAIL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSSN = 1 AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'N' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT ORGDOCID , DOCSTATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
SELECT DEPTID , DEPTNAME , DEPTNAME2 , COMPANYID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND MAINID = #v_MAINID#

select.isEqual: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCSTATE , HREF , APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN = 1 AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , NVL(A.WriterDeptName2, A.WriterDeptName) WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WriterName , NVL(A.WriterName2, A.WriterName) WRITERNAME2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , C.AprMemberJobTitle , NVL(C.AprMemberJobTitle2, C.AprMemberJobTitle) APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND C.AprType IN ( '001','004','016' ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY C.AprMemberSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode , C.sn FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDOCDELIVERY C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM( SELECT TBAPROPINIONINFO.* FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPROPINIONINFO JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO ON TBAPROPINIONINFO.DocID = TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBAPROPINIONINFO.UserID = TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberID AND TBAPROPINIONINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPROPINIONINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPROPINIONINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBAPRLINEINFO.AprMemberSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SIGNTYPE , SIGNNAME , CONTENT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND SIGNNAME LIKE 'sign%' ORDER BY SIGNNAME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERDEPTID , APRMEMBERISDEPTYN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE IN ( '012','011','009','008' ) ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ExtReceptYN = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT SUM(AttachFileSize) TOTALSIZE , CASE WHEN SUM(AttachFileSize) > 6000000 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 0 TOTALSIZE , 'N' FLAG FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT RECORDID , SEPERATEATTACHNO , USERID , USERRIGHT , USERNAME , USERNAME2 , USERTITLE , USERTITLE2 , DEPTCODE , DEPTNAME , DEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECROLEINFO WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND USERRIGHT = 1 AND USERID <> 'All_User' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID , SERIALNO , USERID , USERNAME , USERNAME2 , USERTITLE , (CASE WHEN USERTITLE2 IS NULL THEN USERTITLE ELSE USERTITLE2 END) USERTITLE2 , DEPTCODE , DEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN DEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN DEPTNAME ELSE DEPTNAME2 END) DEPTNAME2 , READDATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECREADHISTORY WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY READDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRMEMBERID , APRMEMBERDEPTID , ISPROPOSERYN , ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBHISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND MODIFYSN = #v_MODIFYSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCSTATE , DOCTYPE , ORGDOCID , HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT APRSN , SIGNTYPE , SIGNNAME , CONTENT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN >= ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) ) AND ( DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 2

SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRTYPE , APRSTATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN >= ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRSTATE = '003' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) ) AND ( DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN

select.isEqual:
SELECT 'DOC' TYPE , DocTitle FILENAME , Href FILEPATH FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATT' TYPE , AttachFileName FILENAME , AttachFileHref FILEPATH FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE , AttachDocName FILENAME , AttachDocURL FILEPATH FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual:

SELECT 'ATT' TYPE , AttachFileName FILENAME , AttachFileHref FILEPATH FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ATTDOC' TYPE , AttachDocName FILENAME , AttachDocURL FILEPATH FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM (
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.SENTDEPTNAME2, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVESN, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID, TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID, TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015')) AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
OR (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014')) OR (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015')
)
AND $v_SPSUBQUERY$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER$
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY PROCESSDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#

SELECT B.Href OrgHref , A.Href Href FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.OrgDocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBAPRDOCINFO.Href , TBAPRDOCINFO.DocType , TBAPRDOCINFO.DocState , TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.AprState , TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.ReceiveSN , ( SELECT TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) RECEIVEDDEPTID , ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT SN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDOCDELIVERY WHERE TBDOCDELIVERY.DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TBDOCDELIVERY.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TBDOCDELIVERY.RECEIPTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 ) SN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO
JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DocID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY PROCESSYN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, WRITERID, APRTYPE, HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE DOCSTATE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE IN ('002', '005') AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) ORDER BY STARTDATE $v_BASICORDER$, DOCID DESC

SELECT DISTINCT CName, MCName, SCName, CABINETID, TBCABINETCLASS.REGSERIALNO, TBCABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR, TBCABINET.VOLUMENO, TBCABINETCLASS.MODIFYFLAG, TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.CONFIRMFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.TASKCODE, TBCABINETCLASS.TASKNAME, TBCABINETCLASS.TASKNAME2, TBCABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTCODE, TBCABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME, TBCABINETCLASS.PROCESSDEPTNAME2, TBCABINET.CABINETCLASSNO, TBCABINETCLASS.RECTYPECODE AS RECTYPECODE, TBCABINETCLASS.CREATEDATE AS CLASSCREATEDATE, TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERID, TBCABINETCLASS.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.TERMINATEFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID, TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERTASK, TBCABINETCLASS.TRANSDELAYFLAG, TBCABINETCLASS.TITLE, TBCABINETCLASS.TITLE2, TBCABINET.CREATEDATE, VTASKCLASS.SUBCATEGORYCODE, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPERIOD, VTASKCLASS.TEMPFLAG, VTASKCLASS.DISPLAYRECFLAG, VTASKCLASS.SC1, VTASKCLASS.SC2, VTASKCLASS.SC3, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGMETHOD, VTASKCLASS.KEEPINGPLACE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBCABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VTASKCLASS ON TBCABINETCLASS.TASKCODE = VTASKCLASS.TaskCode AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = VTASKCLASS.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.DELFLAG = '0' AND TBCABINETCLASS.DELFLAG = '0' AND NOT (TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0') AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND TRIM(TBCABINETCLASS.OWNERDEPTID) = #v_PDEPTCODE#
AND TBCABINETCLASS.PRODUCTIONYEAR = #v_PYEAR#
AND TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2' AND TERMINATEFLAG = '0' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' AND TBCABINET.CABINETID IN ( SELECT CABINETID FROM ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO, MAX(VOLUMENO) AS VOLUMENO, TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET WHERE TBCABINET.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# GROUP BY CABINETCLASSNO,TENANT_ID ) TBMAXVOL INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBMAXVOL.CABINETCLASSNO = TBCABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBMAXVOL.VOLUMENO = TBCABINET.VOLUMENO AND TBMAXVOL.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID )
AND TBCABINET.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG <> '2'
AND TBCABINETCLASS.TITLE$v_LANGTYPE$ like '%$v_SEARCHNAME$%'
ORDER BY TBCABINET.CREATEDATE DESC, CABINETID DESC

SELECT TBAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID , TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID , TBAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID , TBAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME , TBAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , A.ReasonDoNotApprov , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState <> '003' AND A.AprState <> '010' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN ASC

select.isEqual:
SELECT DOCID DOCID , FLAG FLAG FROM ( SELECT DOCID , 'APR' FLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID , 'END' FLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO ) A WHERE DOCID IN ( SELECT ORGDOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ORGDOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT DOCID , 'APR' FLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_DOCID# AND DOCSTATE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT C.DocID , C.FLAG , ( SELECT DocID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO D WHERE D.OrgDocID = C.DOCID AND D.WriterDeptID = C.WRITERDEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) GDOCID FROM ( SELECT A.DOCID DOCID , 'END' FLAG , B.WRITERDEPTID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DocState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND B.OrgDocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocID DocID , 'APR' FLAG , B.WriterDeptID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.ReceivedDeptID = #v_DEPTID# AND A.DocState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND B.OrgDocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY FLAG DESC, DOCID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1 ) C

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT row_number() over($v_tmp$) as rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, NVL(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, NVL(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, NVL(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, NVL(TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, NVL(TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL,'') AS SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND DOCNO LIKE '%$v_DOCNUMBER$%'
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DRAFTER$%'
AND WRITERDEPTNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DEPTNAME$%'
AND FORMID = $v_FORMID$
AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10))
AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE2#,1,10))
AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE1#,1,10))
AND ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE2#,1,10))
AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10))
AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10))
AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
AND CONTAINERID IN ($v_CONTID$)
AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER# GROUP BY TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$ , ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#) WHERE rnum <= #v_PAGESIZE2#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE
ORDER BY ENDDATE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, (CASE WHEN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL END) AS SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID
WHERE TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE DESC
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#
ORDER BY ENDDATE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE2#

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ATTACHFILENAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , NULL ATTACHFILESIZE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '
SELECT DOCTITLE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ATTACHFILENAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , NULL ATTACHFILESIZE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '

SELECT DOCTITLE FROM ( SELECT (CAST(OWNERID AS VARCHAR2(200)) || '@' || CAST(SN AS VARCHAR2(200))) DOCID , DOCTITLE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ATTACHFILENAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHFILEHREF ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE ATTACHFILESIZE FROM ( SELECT (CAST(OWNERID AS VARCHAR2(200)) || '@' || CAST(SN AS VARCHAR2(200))) DOCID , ATTACHFILENAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID#
UNION ALL
SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME ATTACHNAME , ATTACHDOCURL ATTACHFILEHREF , TO_BINARY_FLOAT(NULL) ATTACHFILESIZE FROM ( SELECT (CAST(OWNERID AS VARCHAR2(200)) || '@' || CAST(SN AS VARCHAR2(200))) DOCID , ATTACHDOCNAME , ATTACHDOCURL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRDOCATTACHINFO ) TMP WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID= #v_TENANTID# ) A WHERE A.ATTACHFILEHREF <> ' '

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APRMEMBERSN , APRMEMBERID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '001' ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTNAME, TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE# AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID
NOT
LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = UPPER(#v_MODE#)
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER$
ORDER BY ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER$
)A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER2$
ORDER BY ENDDATE $v_BASICORDER2$

SELECT D.DisplayName$v_pLang$ AS DISPLAYNAME, WRITERDEPTID, COUNT(WRITERDEPTID) AS DRAFTCOUNT, NVL(TOTALCOUNT2, 0) AS SUSINCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.DisplayName$v_pLang$, ContainerOwnDepID, COUNT(ContainerOwnDepID) AS TOTALCOUNT2 , A.TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.tbContainer B ON A.ContainerID = B.ContainerID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDeptmaster C ON B.ContainerOwnDepID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE ContainerTypeID = '500' AND (A.StartDate >= TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.StartDate <= TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) GROUP BY B.ContainerOwnDepID, C.DisplayName$v_pLang$, A.TENANT_ID) B ON A.WriterDeptID = B.ContainerOwnDepID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDeptmaster D ON A.WriterDeptID = D.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND (A.StartDate >= TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.StartDate <= TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) WHERE rownum <= 5 AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY D.DisplayName$v_pLang$, WRITERDEPTID, TOTALCOUNT2 ORDER BY DRAFTCOUNT DESC

SELECT A.DocID , A.AprMemberSN , A.AprType , A.AprState , A.AprMemberID , A.AprMemberIsDeptYN , A.AprMemberName , A.AprMemberName2 , A.AprMemberJobTitle , A.AprMemberJobTitle2 , A.AprMemberDeptID , A.AprMemberDeptName , A.AprMemberDeptName2 , A.AprMemberLDAPPath , A.ReceivedDate , A.ProcessDate , A.isProposerYN , A.isBriefUserYN , A.ReasonDoNotApprov , B.orguserid , B.proxyuserid , B.proxyusername , B.proxyusername2 , B.proxyuserjobtitle , B.proxyuserjobtitle2 , B.proxyuserdeptid , B.proxyuserdeptname , B.proxyuserdeptname2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRLINE B ON A.DocID = B.docid AND A.AprMemberSN = B.aprmemberSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.AprMemberID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.AprState = #v_PAPRSTATE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY A.AprMemberSN DESC

SELECT WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WriterName2 , WRITERJOBTITLE , WriterJobTitle2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WriterDeptName2 , ORGDOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RECEIVESN , SENTDEPTID , SENTDEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN SENTDEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN SENTDEPTNAME ELSE SENTDEPTNAME2 END) AS SENTDEPTNAME2 RECEIVEDDEPTID , RECEIVEDDEPTNAME , (CASE WHEN RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 IS NULL THEN RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ELSE RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 END) AS RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY RECEIVESN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT ORGDOCNUMCODE , HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , '회송문서' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , 'Return a document' APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , B.CabinetID , A.DocTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , A.WriterDeptName2 , A.WriterName , A.WriterName2 , A.EndDate , A.OrgDocID , B.SpecialRecordCode , B.PublicityCode , B.PageNum , B.LimitRange , A.HasAttachYN , C.AprMemberJobTitle , C.AprMemberJobTitle2 , B.SeperateAttachXML , B.DocNumCode , B.OrgDocNumCode FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO C ON A.DocID = C.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND C.AprState IN ( '004' ) ORDER BY C.AprMemberSN DESC )

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.DocID , A.FormID , A.OrgDocID , A.DocType , A.DocState , A.FunctionType , A.Href , A.DocTitle , #v_PDOCNO# DocNo , A.HasAttachYN , A.HasOpinionYN , A.StartDate , A.EndDate , A.WriterID , A.WriterName , A.WriterJobTitle , A.WriterDeptID , A.WriterDeptName , ' ' Html , ' ' pUserID , ' ' pUserName , WriterDeptID pDeptID , ' ' OrgHtml , SecurityCode security , StoragePeriod keepperiod , isPublic publication , WriterID proxyuserid , ItemCode , ItemName , UrgentApproval , KeyWord , ' ' Xdocid , B.SpecialRecordCode SPECIALRECORDCODE , B.PublicityCode PUBLICITYCODE , B.LimitRange LIMITRANGE , B.PageNum PAGENUM , B.CabinetID CABINETID , B.TaskCode TASKCODE , B.DocNumCode DOCNUMCODE , B.OrgDocNumCode ORGDOCNUMCODE , B.SeperateAttachXML SEPERATEATTACHXML , B.Summary SUMMARY , B.SecurityApproval SECURITYAPPROVAL , A.WriterName2 WRITERNAME2 , A.WriterJobTitle2 WRITERJOBTITLE2 , A.WriterDeptName2 WRITERDEPTNAME2 , ' ' PUSERNAME2 , b.ItemName2 ITEMNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.DocID = B.DocID AND A.DocID = #v_PDOCID# AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT CODE2, NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCODELIST WHERE CODE1 = 'A01' AND ISUSE = 1 ORDER BY CODE2

select.isEqual: SELECT NAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND TRIM(CODE2) = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2
SELECT NAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 =#v_CODE1# AND CODE2 =#v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ AS NAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND CODE2 = #v_CODE2# ORDER BY CODE2

select.isEqual: SELECT CODE2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND NAME = #v_NAME#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CODE2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CODE1 = #v_CODE1# AND NAME$v_LANGTYPE$ = #v_NAME#

select.isEqual: SELECT PUBLICITYCODE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(COUNT(DocID), 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RET FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DocID = $v_DOCID$ AND AprMemberID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(TBSEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID, 1, 7) AprMemberDeptID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID WHERE TBRECORD.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT APRMEMBERID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE ( APRMEMBERSN = '1' ) AND ( APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# ) AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SECURITYCODE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBRECROLEINFO.UserRight) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECROLEINFO ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBRECROLEINFO.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBRECROLEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE ( TBRECROLEINFO.SeperateAttachNo = '00' ) AND ( TBRECROLEINFO.UserID = #v_USERID# ) AND ( TBRECROLEINFO.UserRight = '1' ) AND TBRECORD.DocID = #v_DOCID# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015' AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017' AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID# AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID#) AND (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '012' OR TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015'))
OR (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE IN ('011', '014')) OR (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ($v_DEPTIDS$) AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '015') AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
)
AND PROCESSDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND PROCESSDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND PROCESSDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND PROCESSDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O' AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'Y' AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE = '015' AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(SN) AS COUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND STARTDATE >= $v_STARTDATE$ AND STARTDATE <= $v_ENDDATE$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLastDocID SET lastDocID = ( SELECT (max(lastDocID) +1) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLastDocID WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT max(lastDocID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLastDocID WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT NAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CODETYPE = #v_CODETYPE# AND CODE = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(NAME2, NAME) NAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CODETYPE = #v_CODETYPE# AND CODE = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(HREF, ' ') = ' ' THEN ( SELECT HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) ELSE ( SELECT HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) END FROM( SELECT HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
SELECT MAX(SEPERATEATTACHNO) SEPATTSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT Href FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND SN = #v_PSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT DOCSTATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCTITLE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DOCTITLE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND AprMemberSN = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT APRMEMBERID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND AprMemberSN = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT HREF FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT RECEIVESN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN ContainerID IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE ContainerID END FROM ( SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID ContainerID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.tbContainer JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID AND tbContainer.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID WHERE tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #v_DEPTID# AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND tbContainer.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN ContainerTypeID IS NULL THEN ' ' ELSE ContainerTypeID END FROM ( SELECT tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID ContainerTypeID, FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.tbContainerType JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID AND tbContainerType.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #v_DOCSTATE# AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT #v_CONTAINERID# || ':' || #v_CONTAINERTYPEID# CONTAINERID FROM DUAL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.tbContainer ( CONTAINERID, CONTAINERTYPEID, CONTAINEROWNDEPID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_MAXCONTAINERID#, #v_CONTAINERTYPE#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT SUBSTR('0000000000' || ((CASE WHEN MAX(CONTAINERID) IS NULL THEN '0000000000' ELSE MAX(CONTAINERID) END) + 1 ), -10, 10) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.tbContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SPECIALCATALOGFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBCABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
