select.isNotEqual: SELECT ' ' HREF FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT APRTYPE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_APRMEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT CONTENT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# ORDER BY OPINIONSN DESC
SELECT DOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE ORGDOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND DOCSTATE = '015' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DOCID > 0 THEN ( SELECT AprState FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) ELSE ( SELECT AprState FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) DOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVEDDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) )
SELECT MAX(VOLUMENO) + 1 NEWVOLNO FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET WHERE TRIM(CABINETCLASSNO) = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SENTDEPTID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIVESN = #v_RECEIVESN#

SELECT CASE WHEN FORMCONNFLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE FORMCONNFLAG END FORMCONNFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFormInfo A JOIN ( SELECT FORMID ,TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# ) B ON ( A.FormID = B.FORMID ) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND AprType <> '015' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND APRTYPE = '015' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND TBAPRLINEINFO.AprType = '015' AND TBAPRLINEINFO.AprState = '010' AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(SN) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID IN ($v_USERIDS$) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT COUNT(TBFormContainer.FORMCONTID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFormContainer WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS = #v_PID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(TBFormContainer.FormContID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFormContainer LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBFormContUserGroup ON TBFormContainer.FormContID = TBFormContUserGroup.FormContID AND TBFormContainer.TENANT_ID = TBFormContUserGroup.TENANT_ID WHERE ( TBFormContainer.FormContParents = #v_PID# ) AND ( ( TBFormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' ) OR ( TBFormContainer.FormContOwnDepID = #v_PDEPTID# ) OR ( TBFormContUserGroup.FormContUserDepID = #v_PDEPTID# ) ) AND TBFormContainer.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(APRLINESN) , 0) + 1 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBLINTEMPLET WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN APRDEPTSN = 0 THEN 0 WHEN APRDEPTSN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE APRDEPTSN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(APRDEPTSN) APRDEPTSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDEPTTEMPLET WHERE TRIM(FORMID) = #v_FORMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(MODIFYSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(MODIFYSN) end AS MODIFYSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBHISTORYATTACHINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND ATTACHFILESN = #v_ATTACHFILESN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(TBRECORD.RecordID) $sqlString$

SELECT CASE WHEN USER_ID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) USER_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABROLEINFO WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_CabClassNo# AND USER_ID = #v_UserID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUserMaster WHERE Department = #v_DEPTID# AND extensionAttribute1 LIKE '%a=1%' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( APRSTATE = '002' OR APRSTATE = '005' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRTYPE = #v_APRTYPE# AND APRSTATE IN ( '002','005' )
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(APRSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(APRSN) END APRSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSIGNINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT MIN(RegSerialNo) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))||REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '4')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag ) VALUES ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN 0 ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN 0 ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '2'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN 0 ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))||REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '4'), 1, 0 );
sqlMap.select: SELECT RollbackFlag FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))||REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))||REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# + 1 WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type1# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1') AND Type2 = (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '2') AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# END FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3') AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))||REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '4') AND RegSerialNo = #v_CurSN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) END OPINIONSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID#
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE (MAX(SN) + 1) END FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND OPINIONGB = '001' AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND OPINIONGB = '001' AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN MODIFYSN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MODIFYSN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(MODIFYSN) MODIFYSN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBHISTORYLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

SELECT COUNT(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDOCDELIVERY WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT CASE WHEN SN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN SN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(SN) SN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDOCDELIVERY WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND ( TO_CHAR(RECEIPTDATE,'YYYY') = #v_YEAR# ) )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND DOCNO LIKE '%$v_DOCNUMBER$%'
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DRAFTER$%'
AND WRITERDEPTNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%$v_DEPTNAME$%'
AND FORMID = #v_FORMID#
AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE1#,1,10), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_STARTDATE2# ,1,10), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE1#,1,10), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_ENDDATE2# ,1,10), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_PROCESSDATE1#,1,10), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_PROCESSDATE2#,1,10), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
AND CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
AND CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID
WHERE TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
AND #v_USERSECCODE# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #v_USERID#))
AND $v_SUBQUERY$
AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DocID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBAPRLINEINFO.DocID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004' AND APRSTATE = '002'
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) CNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND APRSTATE = '002'

SELECT COUNT(TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.RECEIVEDDEPTID IN ( #v_DEPTINFO# ) AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCSTATE = '011' AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE <> '015' AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') <= #v_UNTILYEAR# AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(CABINETID) CABCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBCABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBCABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND OWNERDEPTID = #v_DEPTCODE# AND TBCABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND TBCABINETCLASS.ExpirationYear < #v_UTCYEAR# AND TBCABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '0' AND TBCABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID
NOT
LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y'
AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = UPPER(#v_MODE#)
AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($v_PUSERIDS$) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND #v_PSUBQUERY#

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND APRMEMBERID = #v_PUSERID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRTYPE <> '007'

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag ) VALUES ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN 0 ELSE #iv_Type1# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '1'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type2# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '2'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='0' THEN '0' ELSE #iv_Type3# end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '3'), ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed ='1' THEN #v_AccountYear# WHEN ISUsed ='2' THEN (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) || REPLACE(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')), ' ', '0') FROM DUAL) end FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID=#TENANTID# ) WHERE Code = '4'), #v_CurSN#, 1 )

SELECT COUNT(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSORID = #v_USERID#) AND (TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '002' OR TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.APRSTATE = '004') AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'O' AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID=#v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.RECEIPTPOINTID LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = 'Y' AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN ( Type1, Type2, Type3, TimeSep, RegSerialNo, RollbackFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 001 END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1')), #v_DDeptCode#, (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISUsed END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3')), (SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN #v_YEAR# || #v_MONTH# END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '4')), $v_RtnSN$, 0 , #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSERIALNUMGEN SET RegSerialNo = $v_RtnSN$ + $v_numRows$ WHERE Type1 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 001 END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '1')) AND Type2 = #v_DDeptCode# AND Type3 = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 0 THEN 0 ELSE $v_numRows$ END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '3')) AND TimeSep = ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISUsed = 1 THEN #v_YEAR# WHEN ISUsed = 2 THEN #v_YEAR# || #v_MONTH# END FROM ( SELECT ISUsed FROM ( SELECT Code , ISUsed FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCODELIST WHERE CodeType = '007' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) WHERE Code = '4')) AND RegSerialNo = $v_RtnSN$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS ( CabinetClassNo, ProcessDeptCode, ProcessDeptName, ProcessDeptName2, TaskCode, TaskName, TaskName2, Title, Title2, ProductionYear, RegSerialNo, RecTypeCode, OwnerName, OwnerName2, OwnerID, ExpirationYear, TerminateFlag, KeepingPeriod, KeepingMethod, KeepingPlace, DisplayRecFlag, DisplayEndDate, DisplayReason, SpecialCatalogFlag, OldCabinetFlag, ModifyFlag, NumOfRec, PageOfRec, NumOfElectronicDoc, ConfirmFlag, CreateDate, ConfirmYear, TransDelayFlag, ExTransYear, TransDelayReason, OwnerDeptID, OwnerTask, DelFlag, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DDeptCode# || #v_DTaskCode# || #v_YEAR# || REPLACE(utils.str($v_SN$ || ($v_RtnSN$-1), 5), ' ', '0') , #v_DDeptCode# , #v_DDeptName# , #v_DDeptName2# , #v_DTaskCode# , #v_DTaskName# , #v_DTaskName2# , Title , Title2 , #v_YEAR# , REPLACE(utils.str($v_SN$ || ($v_RtnSN$-1), 5), ' ', '0') , RecTypeCode , #v_DeptMName# , #v_DeptMName2# , #v_DeptMID# , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , '0' , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , ConfirmFlag , TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , #v_DDeptCode# , #v_DTaskCode# , '0' , TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , sqlMap.select: SELECT TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo CabinetClassNo, NEWTASK.KeepingPeriod, NEWTASK.KeepingMethod, NEWTASK.KeepingPlace, NEWTASK.DisplayRecFlag, NEWTASK.SpecialCatalogFlag FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS ,( SELECT KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , TBTASKCODE.SpecialCatalogFlag FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTASKCODE WHERE TBTASKCODE.TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TBTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) NEWTASK WHERE TRIM(TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo) IN ( SELECT #v_DDeptCode# || #v_DTaskCode# || #v_YEAR# || REPLACE(utils.str($v_SN$ || ($v_RtnSN$-1), 5), ' ', '0') NewCabClsNo FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0' ) AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS SET KeepingPeriod = #KeepingPeriod#, KeepingMethod = #KeepingMethod#, KeepingPlace = #KeepingPlace#, DisplayRecFlag = #DisplayRecFlag#, SpecialCatalogFlag = #SpecialCatalogFlag# WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_rowID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB ( SerialNo, CabinetClassNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT '000' , #v_DDeptCode# || #v_DTaskCode# || #v_YEAR# || REPLACE(utils.str($v_SN$ || ($v_RtnSN$-1), 5), ' ', '0') , ( SELECT SC1 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) , ( SELECT SC2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) , ( SELECT SC3 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTASKCODE WHERE TaskCode = #v_DTaskCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#), #v_TENANTID# FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptCode , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName , TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , OwnerID , ExpirationYear , TerminateFlag , KeepingPeriod , KeepingMethod , KeepingPlace , DisplayRecFlag , DisplayEndDate , DisplayReason , SpecialCatalogFlag , OldCabinetFlag , ModifyFlag , NumOfRec , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.CabinetID IN ( $v_cabList$ ) AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ConfirmFlag ASC ) WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0' )

INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB ( SerialNo, CabinetClassNo, SC1, SC2, SC3, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT SerialNo , #v_DDeptCode# || #v_DTaskCode# || #v_YEAR# || TBCABINETCLASS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskName2 , Title , Title2, ProductionYear , RegSerialNo , RecTypeCode , OwnerName , OwnerName2 , , PageOfRec , NumOfElectronicDoc , NVL(ConfirmFlag, 0) ConfirmFlag , ConfirmYear , TransDelayFlag , ExTransYear , TransDelayReason , OwnerDeptID , OwnerTask , TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID FROM tt_tmpClassInfo.CabinetClassNo WHERE ConfirmFlag = '0' AND SerialNo = '000' AND tt_tmpClassInfo.SpecialCatalogFlag = #v_NewSCFlag# AND SC1 = ( SELECT SC1 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBTASKCODE WHERE UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS SET CONFIRMFLAG = '1', CONFIRMYEAR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY'), EXPIRATIONYEAR = TO_CHAR(add_months(sysdate, -12),'YYYY') WHERE CABINETCLASSNO IN ( SELECT CABINETCLASSNO FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS WHERE ROWID IN ( SELECT TBCABINETCLASS.ROWID row_id FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.DelFlag = '0' AND TBCABINETCLASS.DelFlag = '0' AND NOT ( TBCABINET.CabinetTransferFlag = '2' AND CONFIRMFLAG = '0' ) AND TBCABINETCLASS.TerminateFlag = '1' AND TBCABINETCLASS.ConfirmFlag = '0' AND OWNERDEPTID = 'GJS' AND TBCABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINER A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINER A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid, A.containerowndepid FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINER A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid <> #deptID# ORDER BY A.containerowndepid, B.containertypeid
SELECT cn, displayname, displayname2, extensionattribute5 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND cn IN (#v_CNVALUE#) AND NVL(extensionattribute5, '' ) != ''

SELECT A.cn AS userid, A.displayname AS username, A.displayname2 AS username2, A.extensionattribute5, B.displayname AS pusername, B.displayname2 AS pusername2 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A INNER JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER B ON SUBSTR(A.extensionattribute5,0,INSTR(A.extensionattribute5,':') - 1) = B.cn AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.extensionattribute5 is not null

SELECT pwd FROM EZCOMMON.TBPWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT pwdtype FROM EZCOMMON.TBPWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT receivesn FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docid = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT $v_COL$ FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO B ON A.docid = B.docid AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.docid = #v_DOCID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPAPRLINE B ON A.docid = B.docid AND A.aprmembersn = B.aprmembersn AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.docid = #v_PDOCID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE aprmembersn < ( SELECT aprmembersn FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE docid = #v_PDOCID# AND aprmemberid = #v_PUSERID# AND aprstate = #v_PAPRSTATE# ) AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND (aprtype = '002' OR aprtype = '007' OR aprtype = '008' OR aprtype = '009' OR aprtype = '080' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE aprmembersn < ( SELECT aprmembersn FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND aprmemberid = #v_PUSERID# AND aprstate = #v_PAPRSTATE# ) AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND aprtype IN ( '018','019','007','031','002')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE aprmembersn < ( SELECT aprmembersn FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND aprmemberid = #v_PUSERID# AND aprstate = #v_PAPRSTATE# ) AND docid = #v_PDOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND aprtype = '004'

sqlMap.select: SELECT VERSION , RECORDID , SEPERATEATTACHNO , REGISTERDATE , TITLE , NUMOFPAGE , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTER , DRAFTER2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , UTILS.CONVERT_TO_SMALLDATETIME(MODIFYDATE,p_style=>111) MODIFYDATE , MODIFYREASON , MODIFIERNAME , MODIFIERNAME2 , MODIFIERID , MODIFYFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY VERSION ASC

SELECT TBRECORD.RecordID , TBSEPERATEATTACH.Title , REGISTERTYPE , TBSEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , ELECTRONICRECFLAG , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , LIMITRANGE , MANUALREGFLAG , REGISTERDATE , EXECUTEDATE , SEPERATEATTACHNO , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID WHERE TBRECORD.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN VERSION IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE VERSION + 1 END FROM ( SELECT MAX(VERSION) VERSION FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY ( VERSION, RECORDID, SEPERATEATTACHNO, REGISTERDATE, TITLE, NUMOFPAGE, APRMEMBERTITLE, APRMEMBERTITLE2, DRAFTER, DRAFTER2, EXECUTEDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYFLAG ) ( SELECT #v_newVersion# , TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID , TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo , REGISTERDATE , TBSEPERATEATTACH.Title , TBSEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , UTILS.CONVERT_TO_CHAR(TBSEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate,8,p_style=>112) , NULL , NULL , NULL , NULL , '0' FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD ON TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBRECORD.RecordID AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBRECORD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY ( VERSION, RECORDID, SEPERATEATTACHNO, REGISTERDATE, TITLE, NUMOFPAGE, APRMEMBERTITLE, APRMEMBERTITLE2, DRAFTER, DRAFTER2, EXECUTEDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, MODIFYREASON, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYFLAG ) ( SELECT #v_newVersion# , TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID , TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo , REGISTERDATE , TBSEPERATEATTACH.Title , TBSEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage , APRMEMBERTITLE , APRMEMBERTITLE2 , DRAFTERNAME , DRAFTERNAME2 , EXECUTEDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , UTILS.CONVERT_TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,8,p_style=>112) , #v_CHANGEREASON# , #v_USERID# , #v_USERNAME# , #v_USERNAME2# , '0' FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD ON TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBRECORD.RecordID AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBRECORD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

update.isNotEqual: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH SET NUMOFPAGE = #v_NUMOFPAGE#, MODIFYFLAG = '1', TITLE = #v_TITLE# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
update.isEqual: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH SET NUMOFPAGE = #v_NUMOFPAGE#, MODIFYFLAG = '1' WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD SET REGISTERDATE = #v_REGDATE#, APRMEMBERTITLE = #v_APRMEMTITLE#, APRMEMBERTITLE2 = #v_APRMEMTITLE2#, DRAFTERNAME = #v_DRAFTER#, DRAFTERNAME2 = #v_DRAFTER2#, EXECUTEDATE = #v_EXEDATE#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME = #v_RECEIPTMEM#, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 = #v_RECEIPTMEM2#, ELECTRONICRECFLAG = #v_ELECFLAG# WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID =#v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDOCDELIVERY WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# $v_SUBQUERY$
AND MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
AND ORGANID = #v_ORGANID#
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND CHARGENAME LIKE '%$v_CHARGENAME$%'
AND RECEIPTDATE > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_SREGDATE#,1,19),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND RECEIPTDATE < TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_EREGDATE#,1,19),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT B.* FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE , SN ) AS ROWNUM_,A.* FROM ( SELECT SN, DOCID, HREF, RECEIPTDATE, ORGANID, ORGAN, ORGAN2, DOCNUMBER, MANAGEDEPTID, MANAGEDEPT, MANAGEDEPT2, CHARGEID, CHARGENAME, CHARGENAME2, DEPTID, REMARK, ORGDOCNUMCODE, DOCTITLE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBDOCDELIVERY WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# $v_SUBQUERY$
AND SN BETWEEN #v_PAGESIZE2# AND #v_PAGESIZE#
AND MANAGEDEPTID = #v_MANAGEDEPTID#
AND ORGANID = #v_ORGANID#
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%$v_DOCTITLE$%'
AND CHARGENAME LIKE '%$v_CHARGENAME$%'
AND RECEIPTDATE > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_SREGDATE#,1,19) ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND RECEIPTDATE < TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#v_EREGDATE#,1,19) ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, RECEIPTDATE DESC
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION$, RECEIPTDATE DESC
ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE DESC, SN DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, RECEIPTDATE
ORDER BY $v_ORDEROPTION2$, RECEIPTDATE
ORDER BY RECEIPTDATE DESC, SN
) B WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PAGESIZE2#
SELECT UserName FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABROLEINFO WHERE CabinetClassNo = #v_CABINETCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID WHERE DocID IS NOT NULL AND CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDATTACHINFO ON TBRECORD.DocID = TBENDATTACHINFO.DocID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBENDATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBRECORD.DocID IS NOT NULL AND CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptCode , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName , TBCABCLS.ProcessDeptName2 , TBCABCLS.TaskCode , TBCABCLS.TaskName , TBCABCLS.TaskName2 , TBCABCLS.Title , TBCABCLS.ProductionYear , TBCABCLS.RegSerialNo , TBCABCLS.RecTypeCode , TBCABCLS.ExpirationYear , TBCABCLS.TerminateFlag , TBCABCLS.KeepingPeriod , TBCABCLS.KeepingMethod , TBCABCLS.KeepingPlace , TBCABCLS.DisplayRecFlag , TBCABCLS.DisplayEndDate , TBCABCLS.DisplayReason , TBCABCLS.SpecialCatalogFlag , TBCABCLS.OldCabinetFlag , TBCABCLS.ModifyFlag , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH WHERE CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) NUMOFREC , (SELECT ( ( SELECT CASE WHEN A IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE A END FROM ( SELECT SUM(NumOfPage) A FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH WHERE CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) + ( SELECT CASE WHEN B IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE B END FROM ( SELECT SUM(TBENDATTACHINFO.PageNum) B FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH ON TBRECORD.RecordID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDATTACHINFO ON TBRECORD.DocID = TBENDATTACHINFO.DocID AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = TBENDATTACHINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBSEPERATEATTACH.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBRECORD.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) )) FROM DUAL) NUMOFPAGE , #v_cabID# NUMOFFILE , TBCABCLS.ConfirmFlag , TBCABCLS.ConfirmYear , CATALOGTRANSFERFLAG , CATALOGTRANSFERYEAR , DOCTRANSFERFLAG , DOCTRANSFERYEAR , TBCAB.CabinetID , TBCAB.VolumeNo , TBCAB.CreateDate , TBCAB.CabinetTransferFlag , TBCAB.TCabinetID , TBCAB.TDeptCode , TBCAB.TTaskCode , TBCAB.TProduceYear , TBCAB.TRegSerialNo , TBCAB.TVolumeNo , TBCAB.TCabinetName , TBCAB.TCabinetName2 , TBCAB.TDeptName , TBCAB.TDeptName2 , TBCAB.TTaskName , TBCAB.TTaskName2 , TBCAB.TransferDate , TBOLD.CreateOrganName , TBOLD.ClassificationNo , #v_userName# CABCHARGER FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS TBCABCLS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET TBCAB ON TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo = TBCAB.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID = TBCAB.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBOLDCABINETEXTRAINFO TBOLD ON TBCABCLS.CabinetClassNo = TBOLD.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABCLS.TENANT_ID = TBOLD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCAB.CabinetID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBCAB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = ( SELECT DISTINCT CABINETCLASSNO FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET WHERE CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SERIALNO

SELECT CABINETID , TBCABINETCLASS.TaskCode , TITLE , RECTYPECODE , KEEPINGPERIOD , DISPLAYRECFLAG , DISPLAYENDDATE , DISPLAYREASON , SPECIALCATALOGFLAG , TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETCLASS JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINET ON TBCABINETCLASS.CabinetClassNo = TBCABINET.CabinetClassNo AND TBCABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBCABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCABINET.CABINETID = #v_CABINETID# AND TBCABINET.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_CAB WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT VERSION , CABINETCLASSNO , TITLE , RECTYPECODE , TO_DATE(MODIFYDATE) MODIFYDATE , MODIFYREASON , MODIFIERNAME , MODIFIERNAME2 , MODIFIERID , MODIFYFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABINETHISTORY WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY VERSION ASC
SELECT USER_ID , USERNAME , USERNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBCABROLEINFO WHERE CABINETCLASSNO = #v_CABCLASSNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECEIPTPOINTINFO ( DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, DEPTMEMBERSN, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_DOCID# , RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , EXTRECEPTYN , PROCESSYN , PROCESSSN , CANEDITYN , EXTRECEPTEMAIL , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , PROCESSDATE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , DEPTMEMBERSN, TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_ORGDOCID# AND PROCESSYN IN ( 'N','E','T' ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCTYPE , DOCSTATE , FUNCTIONTYPE , DOCTITLE , DOCNO , HASATTACHYN , HASOPINIONYN , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERJOBTITLE , WRITERJOBTITLE2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 , ISPUBLIC FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT SECURITYCODE , STORAGEPERIOD , KEYWORD , FORMNAME , FORMNAME2 , COMPANYID , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , ITEMNAME2 , URGENTAPPROVAL , TEMPATTRIBUTE , STATUS , SPECIALRECORDCODE , PUBLICITYCODE , LIMITRANGE , PAGENUM , CABINETID , TASKCODE , DOCNUMCODE , ORGDOCNUMCODE , SEPERATEATTACHXML , SUMMARY , SECURITYAPPROVAL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT CASE WHEN RECEIVESN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN RECEIVESN = 0 THEN 0 ELSE RECEIVESN END FROM ( SELECT MAX(RECEIVESN) RECEIVESN FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO SET DEPTMEMBERSN = #v_DEPTMEMBERSN# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND RECEIPTPOINTID = #v_RECEIPTPOINTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RECEIPTPOINTID , RECEIPTPOINTNAME , RECEIPTPOINTNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERID , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME , RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2 , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE , RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2 , EXTRECEPTEMAIL FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND PROCESSSN = 1 AND EXTRECEPTYN = 'N' AND PROCESSYN = 'W'

SELECT SERIALNO , SC1 , SC2 , SC3 FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC WHERE RECORDID = ( SELECT DISTINCT RECORDID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY SERIALNO

SELECT CASE WHEN FLAGCOUNT > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM( SELECT CASE WHEN FLAG='N' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DocID) FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID = #v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) END AS FLAGCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DocState='017' THEN 'Y' WHEN FunctionType = ' ' OR FunctionType IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FLAG FROM ( SELECT DocState , FunctionType FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBAPRDOCINFO WHERE DocID =#v_DocID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)))

SELECT CASE WHEN VERSION IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE VERSION + 1 END FROM( SELECT MAX(VERSION) VERSION FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY WHERE RECORDID= #v_RECORDID# AND SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY (Version, RecordID, SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, Title, NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, Drafter, Drafter2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, ModifyDate, ModifyReason, ModifierID, ModifierName, ModifierName2, ModifyFlag, TENANT_ID) (Select #v_HISTORYCNT#, TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID, TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, TBSEPERATEATTACH.Title, TBSEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, DrafterName, DrafterName2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, TO_CHAR(TBSEPERATEATTACH.CreateDate,'YYYYMMDD'), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '1' , TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID From EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH Inner Join EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD ON TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBRECORD.RecordID AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBRECORD.TENANT_ID Where TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORDHISTORY (Version, RecordID, SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, Title, NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, Drafter, Drafter2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, ModifyDate, ModifyReason, ModifierID, ModifierName, ModifierName2, ModifyFlag, TENANT_ID) (Select #v_HISTORYCNT#, TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID, TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo, RegisterDate, TBSEPERATEATTACH.Title, TBSEPERATEATTACH.NumOfPage, AprMemberTitle, AprMemberTitle2, DrafterName, DrafterName2, ExecuteDate, ReceiptMemberName, ReceiptMemberName2, TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE# ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_CHANGEREASON#, #v_USERID#, #v_USERNAME#, #v_USERNAME2#, '1' , TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID From EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH Inner Join EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD ON TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = TBRECORD.RecordID AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = TBRECORD.TENANT_ID Where TBSEPERATEATTACH.RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.SeperateAttachNo= #v_SEPATTNO# AND TBSEPERATEATTACH.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSEPERATEATTACH SET ModifyFlag = '1' WHERE RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND SEPERATEATTACHNO = #v_SEPATTNO# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD SET SpecialRecordCode = #v_SPECIALREC#, PublicityCode = #v_PUBCODE#, LimitRange = #v_LIMITRANGE# WHERE RecordID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET SpecialRecordCode = #v_SPECIALREC#, PublicityCode = #v_PUBCODE#, LimitRange = #v_LIMITRANGE# WHERE DOCID = ( SELECT DOCID FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBRECORD WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECORDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyID}.TBSPECIALCATALOGINFO_REC WHERE RECORDID = #v_RECID# AND SERIALNO != '000' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
